claims.subject: HelixPay
claims.evidence: we set it a year ago when the funnel was different, the funnel is now different, and the team is still being measured against it. so the team is making the calls but a lot of those calls are low quality follow-ups to recycled leads. we should have changed the metric six months ago.
claims.object_value: target set one year ago; should have been changed six months ago; calls are low quality follow-ups to recycled leads

claims.subject: HelixPay
claims.evidence: right now i ask sales people what's likely to close and they tell me what they want me to hear. if a system could ground the conversation in actual signal — last touch date, response cadence, internal stakeholders engaged — pipeline accuracy goes up.
claims.object_value: pipeline reviews biased by rep self-reporting; lacks grounding in actual signal (last touch date, response cadence, internal stakeholders engaged)

claims.subject: HelixPay Brasil
claims.evidence: the brazil number. and the eighty-call target. if you read internal communication you'd think we're a couple of months from fixing brazil and that the team is hitting activity targets. neither is fully true.
claims.object_value: internal communications overstate progress on Brazil performance; reality is neither the Brazil number nor activity targets are fully on track
